add_key.summary: Identify the instrument cluster, back up available immobiliser data, prepare the correct dealer key and adapt the complete key set using a supported route.

all_keys_lost.summary: Read the supported cluster security data, prepare the correct transponder/dealer key and perform AKL adaptation.
all_keys_lost.warning: Cluster removal or bench work may be required.

add_key.summary: Confirm dashboard type and processor, then use the supported diagnostic or saved-data Add Key route.

all_keys_lost.summary: Use the supported processor-specific cluster security-data route before preparing and adapting all keys.
all_keys_lost.warning: Do not assume universal OBD support.
